story.text:
# 📖 ZK Tale 22: zkEVM Empire 🌗
**act** · swordsman · knowledge · zero_knowledge

The zkEVM Empire. Blade 59 (111011), Moon Phase 🌗, V(π,t) terms: [T_∫(π), C, Q, Value]. Vertex ⟨1,1,0,1,1,1⟩. zkEVM, Type 1-4 Equivalence, Bytecode Proving, State Diffs. Architect persona cameo.

> *To prove the world computer is to recursively verify every computation layer — opcodes, state, gas, calls. Perfect equivalence costs proving time; custom bytecode gains speed but loses compatibility. Choose your type by what matters most.*

## Edges out

- *follows* → [[ZK Tale 23: Private Coin of Zcash 🌖]]
- *extends* → [[T_∫(π) — Path Integral]]

## Edges in

- [[ZK Tale 21: Circom Workshops 🌔]] *follows* →
- [[Zero Knowledge Spellbook v2.0]] *defines* →
- [[Architect ☯️🤖]] *narrates* →
